description: The LegacyEnumEditor component is used to cycle between enums. It is Legacy content migrated from other platforms. This should not be used, and replaced whenever possible.

fields.Slant: The beveledness of the UI elements.
fields._textSlot: The slot of the text visual for the enum indicator
fields._textRenderer: The text renderer of the enum indcator.
fields._textEditor: The text editor for editing the enum text.
fields._textBounds: The field that is used to make the UI wrap around the text
fields._colliderSize: The size of the collider for the UI.
fields._meshLeft: The mesh of the left cycle button
fields._meshRight: The mesh of the right cycle button
fields._textLeftBounds: The field to make the UI wrap around the left button text.
fields._textRightBounds: The field to make the UI wrap around the right button text.
fields._leftTextRenderer: The renderer for the text of the left button.
fields._rightTextRenderer: The renderer for the text of the right button.
fields._colliderLeftSize: The collider field to drive to make the collider envelop the left UI.
fields._colliderRightSize: the collider firld to drive to make the collider envelop the right UI.
fields._leftOffset: The field to drive for the left button offset.
fields._rightOffset: The field to drive for the right button offset.
fields._leftTextPosition: The field to drive for the left text position.
fields._rightTextPosition: The field to drive for the right text position.
fields.Value: The Enum that this component has selected.
fields._textDrive: The string field to drive with the string version of the selected enum from ``Value``.

methods.EditingStarted: Called when the enum text field is entered into.
methods.EditingChanged: Called when the enum text field is changed.
methods.EditingFinished: Called when the enum text field is finished with editing.
methods.OnLeftTouched: Called when the left button is touched.
methods.OnRightTouched: Called when the right button is touched.

usage:
When attaching, the component needs an Enum type for E.
But just don't use this component for new content at all.
